mapper.select: SELECT a.*, c.name as category_name, u.username as created_by_username FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.created_by = u.id ORDER BY a.created_time DESC
SELECT a.*, c.name as category_name, u.username as created_by_username FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.created_by = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT a.*, c.name as category_name, u.username as created_by_username FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.created_by = u.id WHERE a.status = #{status} ORDER BY a.created_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, summary = #{summary}, status = #{status}, category_id = #{categoryId}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT view_count FROM article WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) as articleCount, COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) as totalViews, COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) as totalLikes FROM article WHERE status = 1

SELECT a.*, c.name as category_name, u.username as created_by_username FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.created_by = u.id WHERE a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
